calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Nov-19-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: David Zeff for and with (executor) Mark Rennie.

The Court stated that there are several issues as laid out in the examiner's notes. Mr. Zeff apologized for the errors, stated that he has consents from all of the beneficiaries, that he tried to file the receipt for deposit of cash but found it has to be e-filed, that in regards to the payment of costs to himself he will be filing a declaration, pointed out a typo in the supplement of an incorrect dollar amount, that they had understood that the executor had a right to sell personal property and did so prior to the appraisal and that the probate referee (Shirley Yawitz) incorporated the sale amount into the appraisal. The Court confirmed that the personal property was sold first and then the referee adopted the figure into the appraisal. Mr. Zeff stated that the property consisted of musical instruments, a motorcycle and a train set and confirmed that he needed to file a corrected proof of service on the notice. The accounting petition was taken under submission and counsel was told to file the receipts, declaration and proof of service today.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Kabasares. (Not Reported)

Petition For Determination Of Entitlement To Estate Distribution
Off Calendar Jun-04-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: David Zeff for and with Mark Rennie.

Mr. Zeff stated that there is no opposition and no word from anyone. The Court granted the Petition for Determination of Entitlement to Estate Distribution (subject to review of the order).

REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (450-452 Broadway, S.F.)
Off Calendar Sep-25-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: David Zeff for and with Mark Rennie.

The Court raised the issue of no notice of the amendment to the petition to Mr. Mah and Ms. Wong. Mr. Zeff provided a copy of a Withdrawal of Offer to Purchase Real Property from Joseph Ma and Annie Wong. Counsel was directed to file said document. All Parties stipulated to Michael Matthews acting as dual agent for Mr. Lin and Mr. Rennie. The sale was confirmed to Victor Yang (Agent) on behalf of Wealth Harvest, LLC at $1,330,000.00 subject to the terms and conditions as set forth in the report of sale. The Court granted the petition (subject to receipt and review of the order). Bond is not required.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy T. Bradley. (Not Reported)

REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (450-452 Broadway, S.F.)
Off Calendar Sep-03-2013 Continued To Sep-18-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: David Zeff for and with Mark Rennie (Executor).

The Court expressed concern stating that there was nothing before it indicating that Mr. Mah and Ms. Wong (origninal Buyers as reflected in the petition) had withdrawn their offer, that the petition will need to be amended, that Mr. Matthews (Real Estate Agent) is representing the Seller (Mr. Rennie) and the interested Buyer Dennis Lin (potential conflict), and that Mr. Lin indicated that he was not represented by an Agent when he first appeared/checked in with the Clerk. The Court stated that it would like a declaration from Mr. Mah and Ms. Wong as well as a declaration regarding the issue of conflict with representation of Michael Mathews for both the Seller and a Buyer. The Report of Sale and Petition to Confirm Sale of Real Property was continued to September 18, 2013 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for Counsel to file an amended petition, as well as the above stated two declarations.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy T. Bradley. (Not Reported)

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Dec-26-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: David Zeff for and with Mark Rennie (Petitioner). Ed Koplowitz for Palestine Children's Relief fund (Beneficiary).

Mr. Zeff stated that Eileen Colombo (Objector) chose not appear by court call and that he had nothing to add. Mr. Koplowitz stated that he was not here to object. The Court noted that it does not have a properly filed and served objection, and that Ms. Colombo was not on the line. The Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary appointing Mark Rennie as Executor (subject to review of the order). The will that is being admitted waives bond.

Judge: Peter Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Saxena.
